use_cases: Clickable button for form submissions and actions
Primary call-to-action buttons with variant styles
Icon-only buttons for compact UI interfaces
Ghost buttons for secondary navigation actions
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with Radix UI Slot integration and CVA-powered variants for different visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility focus states and disabled states, making it suitable as a foundational UI building block across any industry or platform.
